_doc: Nested sub-repos to materialize into a worktree. These are gitignored, own-remote repos that `.worktreeinclude` cannot copy. The hook clones a missing entry from the local primary checkout or remote, then checks out and verifies the full immutable commit in `ref`. Update a ref only after reviewing that upstream revision. A deliberately mutable local experiment must set `development: true` and is not a distribution-safe input. See skills/nested-repos.
